title: Communauté de communes du Saulnois
summary: The Communauté de communes du Saulnois (Community of communes of Saulnois) is a federation of municipalities of the rural Saulnois region, located in the department of Moselle in Eastern France. It consists of 128 communes. Its seat is in Château-Salins. Its area is 974.4 km2, and its population was 28,853 in 2018.
text:
The Communauté de communes du Saulnois (Community of communes of Saulnois) is a federation of municipalities of the rural Saulnois region, located in the department of Moselle in Eastern France. It consists of 128 communes. Its seat is in Château-Salins. Its area is 974.4 km2, and its population was 28,853 in 2018.
